services_supported: recurring monthly and quarterly maintenance plans
emergency_definition: active rodent infestations in food service areas
wasp or bee nests near entrances or occupied spaces
wildlife incursion like raccoons or possums inside a building

non_emergency_routing_rules.during_hours: Collect name and phone number, determine service type, and transfer or schedule.
non_emergency_routing_rules.after_hours: Take message with name, phone, and description. Call back next business day.

call_transfer_rules.transfer_fail_protocol: we assure the caller someone will call back within 45 minutes

after_hours_flow_summary: After hours: greet caller, determine if emergency. If emergency: collect name, phone, address, attempt transfer to on-call. If transfer fails: assure callback. If non-emergency: take message, callback next business day.
office_hours_flow_summary: During hours: greet caller, ask how to help, collect name and phone, determine service type, transfer to appropriate extension/department. If transfer fails: assure callback within specified timeframe.
notes: Auto-extracted from demo call transcript for ClearView Pest Control. Confidence scores are per-field estimates; fields below 60% should be verified with the client.
